title: KEYGEN COLLAB.  IT'S OVER, FOLKS. RESULTS ARE UP.
description:
OMFG I AM ON KEYGENJUKEBOX NOW

Yep, one of these.

First off, It's a YTPMV collab where you enter a YTPMV that is based around a song from a Keygen

You can get keygen songs here:
http://www.keygenjukebox.com/

You've got a month to make an awesome YTPMV out of any song from KeygenJukebox.

You CAN NOT use Team Fortress 2, CD-i, I.M. Meen, Manwith10toes' Time Machine video, Blazephlozard, Nostalgia Critic, Sonic and the Black Knight, or the Japanese Ronald McDonald (all commercials)  to make this video. 

I'll judge you on Style, Visuals, Pitch, and Rhythm. If it's good, you get a subscription from me.

Also, Adobe Premiere Elements 7 (or CORE - Dreamweaver as it's called on KeygenJukebox) or the Sony Vegas 8 (Dynamite - Winamp) are banned.

Any that have them will be removed but will be a pretty cool story bro to tell about.

All entries due by August 15th, 11:59 PM.  THAT'S PLENTY OF TIME.

SO GET TO IT.
